Score.Description: Aware of basic syntax; copies snippets without understanding.
Writes scripts with loops/functions; doesn't yet reach for stdlib.
Comfortable with stdlib (itertools, collections); thinks idiomatically.
Reads CPython source occasionally; understands GIL/iterators/generators.
Senior Python; designs APIs, knows performance trade-offs cold.
Knows SELECT/WHERE; struggles with JOINs.
Writes multi-table JOINs; awkward with GROUP BY + window functions.
Comfortable with window functions, CTEs, aggregation patterns.
Reads EXPLAIN output; thinks about indexes and query plans.
Senior; designs schemas, partitioning strategies, ETL pipelines.
Reads stack traces; uses print statements.
Uses a debugger; understands breakpoints, watch expressions.
Uses pdb/lldb fluently; bisects regressions with git bisect.
Uses tracing (strace/lsof/tcpdump on Linux); profiles hot paths.
Diagnoses production incidents under time pressure; flame graphs, eBPF.
Knows basic arrays/dicts; cannot reason about complexity.
Uses sorting/hashing; informal big-O understanding.
Comfortable with trees/graphs, recursion, DP basics.
Designs algorithms with rigorous big-O analysis; advanced DS (segment trees, union-find).
Expert; reads/contributes algorithm research; designs novel solutions.
Knows what HTTP is; never built an API.
Builds CRUD with a framework; doesn't think about REST conventions.
Designs RESTful APIs; knows auth/middleware/status codes.
Architects multi-service systems; queues, async, idempotency.
Designs framework-level abstractions; writes OSS libraries.
